how_to_run: Give each prompt to a fresh agent session in a host with this skill installed alongside its normal skill set. Grade: (1) skill activation equals should_trigger; (2) when expected_route is non-null, the first announced route matches. Near-miss negatives matter as much as positives — over-triggering on Q&A is a failure.

cases.prompt: Fix the typo in the login button label
cases.notes: A one-step edit should stay on the host's ordinary fast path. Direct remains available after explicit invocation.

cases.prompt: Add rate limiting to our public API endpoints
Refactor the payments retry logic, tests exist
cases.notes: Payments = high-risk signal even with good tests.

cases.prompt: Rename getUser to fetchUser across the repo, about 200 call sites
cases.notes: Mechanical, type-checkable, single session. Distributed only if verification per-slice is genuinely needed.

cases.prompt: Build the CSV importer feature. It will take several days and must survive restarts of our sessions.
cases.notes: Horizon beyond one session stated explicitly.

cases.prompt: 帮我把这个 bug 修一下，顺便决定要不要走完整流程
cases.notes: Route depends on probe + classification; the ask is literally this skill's job.

cases.prompt: Debug why the nightly job runs out of memory
cases.notes: Execution task; diagnosis phase may be delegated to an installed debugging skill.

cases.prompt: Migrate the users table to the new schema on production
cases.notes: Data migration + prod = high risk, irreversible; verifier and explicit approval required.
Pure Q&A. Near-miss: mentions a technical topic but there is no work to route.

cases.prompt: Write a blog post announcing our launch
cases.notes: Prose-only writing; out of scope by description.

cases.prompt: What's the difference between a git worktree and a clone?
cases.notes: Q&A near-miss using this skill's own vocabulary.
Standalone review request routes to a dedicated review skill; the workloop routes work it is about to execute.

cases.prompt: Resume the workloop episode from yesterday
cases.notes: Explicit resume; must follow the resume protocol (manifest → progress → contract → re-verify).

cases.prompt: 这个任务怎么开工？该用多重的流程？
cases.notes: Direct ask for process routing, Chinese phrasing from the description.

cases.prompt: Fix the failing parser unit test; the failure points to one assertion
cases.notes: Ordinary isolated bug fix belongs to the host's debugging/TDD path unless risk or coordination grows.

cases.prompt: Add the missing return type annotation in src/format.ts
Run the existing tests and tell me whether they pass
cases.notes: A bounded diagnostic command does not need process routing.

cases.prompt: Review this implementation plan and point out gaps
cases.notes: Standalone review should route to a dedicated review skill.
